description: Memorandum of association listing two initial subscribers.
inputText:
# Memorandum of Association

of ACME WIDGETS LIMITED

Incorporated on 2 February 2015

Each subscriber to this memorandum of association wishes to form a company under the Companies Act 2006 and agrees to become a member and to take at least one share.

| Name of subscriber | Number of shares taken |
|--------------------|------------------------|
| John A. Smith | 1 |
| Mary Patel | 1 |

Dated 2 February 2015.
